---
title: "import_data20250325"
author: "olena"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## About

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

```{r}

```


## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
library(readABF)
library(tidyverse)
library(DT)
#install.packages("readABF")
install.packages("plotly")
```

##Cell: 2025 03 25
Fiest lets just import 1 file

```{r}
list.files()
```


```{r import_file}
import_data_20250325<-readABF("data/2025_03_25/2025_03_25_0007.abf")


#The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
```
```{r}
as.data.frame(import_data_20250325, sweep=1)
```

```{r}
map(1:10,sqrt)
```
```{r}
extract_sweep<- function(sweep_n, abf){
  abf |>
    as.data.frame(sweep=sweep_n) |>
    mutate(sweep=sweep_n)
}

extract_sweep(sweep_n=1, abf=import_data_20250325)
length(import_data_20250325$data)


sweep_dfs <- map(1:17,extract_sweep, abf= import_data_20250325 )
import_data_20250325 <-   bind_rows(sweep_dfs)

abf_to_df <- function(abf){
  map(1:length(abf$data), extract_sweep, abf=abf) |>
    bind_rows()
}

abf_to_df(import_data_20250325)



```
## now import all data for the cell
```{r real_import}

files<-list.files("data/2025_03_25/",
           pattern= ".abf", 
           full.names = TRUE)

abfa<-map(files, readABF)

dfs <- map(abfa, abf_to_df)

files |> str_sub(-9,-5)

names(dfs)<-files |> str_sub(-9,-5)

import_data_20250325 |> rename(
  time_s= `Time [s]`,
  current_pA= any_of(c("Currnt0Pr [pA]", "Volt0pr [pA]"))
)

dfs <- map(
  dfs,
  dplyr::rename, time_s= `Time [s]`,
  current_pA= any_of(c("Currnt0Pr [pA]", "Volt0Pr [pA]"))
  )


dfs<-map(dfs, select, time_s, current_pA, sweep)

all_sweeps <- bind_rows(dfs, .id = "file")




```

## anotate

here we add variables for simulation type and condition (control, noradrenaline, washout)

```{r annotate}
#| eval: false
all_sweeps <- all_sweeps %>%
    # only files with normal protocol, not "DLF"
    # for "_0012" only recordings before NA addition were included
    filter (
        file %in% c("_0011", "_0013", "_0014", "_0015") | 
            (file == "_0012" & sweep <= 10)
        ) %>%
    mutate(
        # type of fibers stimulated in this file / sweep (A, C or both)
        # in this cell only AC simulations were performed
        stim = case_when(
            file %in% c("_0007", "_0013", "_0014", "_0015") ~ if_else(sweep <= 10, "AC", "C"),
            file == "_0011" ~ if_else(sweep <= 12, "AC", "C"),
            file == "_0012" ~ "AC"
        ),
        # condition of recording (control, noradrenaline, washout)
        cond = case_when(
            file %in% c("_0007", "_0011", "_0012") ~ "control",
            file == "_0013" ~ "noradrenalin",
            file %in% c("_0014", "_0015") ~ "washout"
        )
    ) %>%
    mutate(
        stim = as.factor(stim),
        cond = as.factor(cond),
    )



```

## writnig dtaa
```{r}
write_tsv(all_sweeps, file="all_sweeps.tsv")
```


## session info 
```{r info }

sessionInfo()
install.packages("shiny")
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
install.packages("bslib")
```

##calculate passive parameters
```{r passive}
voltage_step_data<- all_sweeps|>
  filter(between(time_s,0.12, 0.22))
baseline_tw<- c(0.14,0.16)
peal_tw <- c(0.159, 0.165)
plateau_tw <- c(0.180, 0.198)

voltage_step_data <- all_sweeps |>
  filter(between(time_s, 0.12, 0.22))

baseline_tw <- c(0.14, 0.16)
peak_tw <- c(0.159, 0.165)
plateau_tw <- c(0.180, 0.198)

plot_voltage_step <- ggplot(voltage_step_data,
   aes(x = time_s, y = current_pA, group = interaction(file,sweep), color = file)
   )+
    geom_line(alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = baseline_tw, color = "lightblue") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = peak_tw, color = "pink") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = plateau_tw, color = "lightgreen")

ggplotly(plot_voltage_step)

passive_parameters <- voltage_step_data |>
   group_by(file,sweep) |>
  summarise(
      baseline_pA = mean(
        current_pA[between(time_s, baseline_tw[1], baseline_tw[2])]
        ),
      peak_pA = min(
        current_pA[between(time_s, peak_tw[1], peak_tw[2])] 
        ) - baseline_pA,
      plateau_pA = mean(
        current_pA[between(time_s, plateau_tw[1], plateau_tw[2])]
        ) - baseline_pA,
      Rs_MOhm = -10000 / peak_pA,
      Rtotal_MOhm = -10000 / plateau_pA,
      Rmemb_MOhm = Rtotal_MOhm - Rs_MOhm
      )


decay_tw <- c(0.1605, 0.175)

voltage_step_data |>
  group_by(file,sweep)|>
  summarise(
    baseline=mean(current_pA[between(time_s, baseline_tw[1], baseline_tw[2])],
      peak= min(current_pA [between(time_s, peak_tw[1], peak_tw[2] )])-baseline
      
  ))

#### This Part of code will be VERY hard to explain ####
# so we will just copypaste it (it must be robust to errors)
# and i will give a general overview what it is doing:

decay_fits <- voltage_step_data |>
  filter(time_s >= decay_tw[1], time_s <= decay_tw[2]) |>
  nest(.by = c(file, sweep)) |>
# now we have list-column "data" which will be used for modelling
mutate(
  models = map(
    data,
    possibly(\(x) nls(x,
                 formula = current_pA ~ SSasymp(time_s, Asym, R0, lrc))
             )
    ),

coefs = map(models, coef), #extracting coeficients from model
lrc = map_dbl(coefs, \(x) pluck(x, "lrc", .default = NA)),
# pluck() extract value of the lrc from all coefs lists.
tau = 1/exp(lrc)
# SSasymp calculate natural Logarithm of Rate Constant (lrc),
# but we need tau which is 1 / rate constant
) |>
select(file, sweep, tau) # only the variable we needed

#### END OF HARD PART ####

passive_parameters <- passive_parameters |>
  left_join(decay_fits) |>
  mutate(
    Cmemb_approx_pF = tau / Rs_MOhm * 10^6,
   Cmemb_pF = tau / (1/(1/Rs_MOhm + 1/Rmemb_MOhm)) * 10^6
  )


passive_parameters |>
  select(file, sweep, baseline_pA, Rs_MOhm, Rmemb_MOhm, Cmemb_pF)|>
  datatable(rownames= FALSE)


passive_parameters|>
  select(file, sweep, baseline_pA, Rs_MOhm, Rmemb_MOhm, Cmemb_pF) |>
  na.omit() |>
  GGally::ggpairs(
    aes(color = file),
    columns = 3:6
    )
##install.packages("GGally")








```

##post response
```{r}
AC_responses<-all_sweeps |>
  filter(between (time_s, 0.28, 0.4)) |>
  filter(stim == "AC")

bl_area_tw<- c(0.285, 0.2935)
area_tw<- c(0.3045, 0.386)

ACtraces_plot <- ggplot(AC_responses, aes(
  x=time_s,
  y=current_pA,
  group= interaction(file, sweep),
  color=file
))+
  geom_line(# show.legend = FALSE,
            alpha = 0.5,
            )+
  geom_vline(xintercept = bl_area_tw, color= "lightblue")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = area_tw, color = "pink")
ggplotly(ACtraces_plot)
 

AC_area <- AC_responses|>
 group_by (file, sweep) |>
   mutate(
    current_pA= current_pA - mean(current_pA[between(time_s, bl_area_tw[1],
                                                     bl_area_tw[2])
                                             ])
  )|>
  filter(between(time_s, area_tw[1], area_tw[2]))|>
  summarise(
    total_area = sum(current_pA)*0.00005
  )
bl_mono1_tw<- c (0.305, 0.30245)
mono1_tw <-  c( 0.3057, 0.3085)

# AC_mono1_amplts <- AC_responses|>
#  group_by (file, sweep) |>
#    mutate(
#     current_pA= current_pA - mean(current_pA[between(time_s, bl_mono1_tw[1],
#                                                      bl_mono1_tw[2])
#                                              ]))|>
#  filter(between(time_s, mono1_tw[1], mono1_tw[2]))|>
#   summarise(
#     amplitude_area =min(current_pA)
#     
#   )
calculate_response<-function (data, baseline_tw, resp_tw, param) {
  data|>
    mutate(
    current_pA= current_pA - mean(current_pA[between(time_s, bl_tw[1],
                                                     bl_tw[2])
                                             ]))|>
 filter(between(time_s, resp_tw[1], resp_tw[2]))|>
  ssummarise(
    parameter = case_when(
      param == "amplitude" ~ min(current_pA), 
      param == "area" ~ sum(current_pA) * 0.00005,
      .unmatched = "error"
      )
    )
}


AC_all_params <- c(AC_area) |> 
  left_join( AC_mono1_amplitude)|>
left_join(AC_mono2_amplitude)|>
  left_join(AC_mono3_amplitude)|>
  left_join(passive_parameters)
  


```
